AddIpv6OnlyOutboundAndNoInboundPolicy.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddIpv6OnlyOutboundAndNoInboundPolicy.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
AddIpv6OnlyOutboundAndNoInboundPolicy.cidr: The CIDR for the outbound-only (no inbound) policy
